text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm about to eat in the cafeteria...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
"Special Mont Blanc! Only Ten Available a Day!"
That sounds enticing, but they look so calorie
dense...
choice_data_list: That's some look on your face. Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Eeek! G-goodness, it's just you. I would
appreciate it if you didn't scare me so!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: More importantly, I wish to seek your advice! I—ahem. I mean, a friend of mine has a bit of an issue...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Despite understanding the importance of
maintaining her weight in order to prepare for her
race properly, well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Let's just say she has trouble adhering to her strict
diet at the best of times. Have you any advice for
her regarding this issue?
choice_data_list:
She should do her best to stick to her diet until
the race is over.

She should be fine if she runs more to burn off
what she eats.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, of course! It's certainly important to stick
to one's word, and one must practice self-control.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Many thanks for your advice! I appreciate—I mean, I'm sure my friend will appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, indeed! I was thinking that as well!
Repressing your urges for too long is detrimental
to your health, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'll have just a smidgen of this as a treat! I
shall savor this later. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Many thanks for your advice! I appreciate—I mean, I'm sure my friend will appreciate it!
